title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
